channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: From Strained Relations to Strategic Partnership: Tinubu and Trump's Diplomatic Reset
item.description: The article details the transformation of Nigeria's relationship with the US under President Tinubu and former President Trump. Initially marked by tensions over religious persecution allegations and ...

item.title: Hikers face charges after off-leash dog encounter with bear in Banff
item.description: A group of hikers in Banff National Park has been charged following a video that captured their encounter with a bear while walking with an off-leash dog. The incident, which has sparked discussions a...

item.title: Pakistan's diplomatic efforts to combat Afghanistan's terrorism through SCO cooperation
item.description: Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar emphasized during the Shanghai Cooperation Organisation (SCO) Council of Foreign Ministers' meeting that durable peace and stability in the region ...

item.title: Toronto Blue Jays' Flaming Dragon Ride-On Sparks Toy Store Frenzy in Kingston
item.description: The Flaming Dragon Ride-On, a plush dragon mounted on a stick, has become an unofficial good-luck charm for Toronto Blue Jays fans after appearing in the team's dugout during a series in San Francisco...

item.title: Kiambu County Achieves Record Revenue Growth Through Automation and Development Projects
item.description: Kiambu County has recorded its highest-ever own-source revenue of KSh 6.5 billion for the 2025-2026 financial year, marking a more than twofold increase from the KSh 2.9 billion collected in 2022. Gov...

item.title: Jennie Debuts Summer-Themed Single 'Less Than a Lover'
item.description: Jennie, a member of the K-pop group Blackpink, has released her new solo single 'Less Than a Lover,' which serves as an ode to summer and explores the nuanced dynamics of a relationship that exists be...

item.title: Website blocks bot traffic with access guidelines
item.description: The article discusses a technical message from News Corp Australia regarding bot traffic management on their websites. It explains that automated crawlers are restricted to prevent excessive requests....

item.title: Modi Announces New Law on Exam Paper Leaks, Higher Education Secretary Replaced Amid Protests
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi announced a new law targeting exam paper leaks during a midnight video address, promising swift action through fast-track courts and stricter penalties. The government has...

item.title: Tanzania Leads Kenya in Tourism Revenue Amid Boxing Medal Hopes
item.description: Tanzania has emerged as a top performer in the global tourism sector, surpassing Kenya in earnings for the fiscal year ending July 2026. This achievement highlights the country's growing appeal as a t...

item.title: Limpopo man receives 25-year sentence for rape and robbery after 12-year legal battle
item.description: A 28-year-old man from Limpopo has been sentenced to 25 years' imprisonment for raping and robbing an 18-year-old woman in September 2014. The case, which took 12 years to resolve, involved Nhlanhla M...

item.title: Working Student Injured in Hit-and-Run Incident in Cavite
item.description: A working student was seriously injured in a hit-and-run incident that occurred in Cavite on July 24, 2026. The victim, identified as a young woman, was reportedly struck by a vehicle that fled the sc...

item.title: Golden Retriever and New Puppy Share Bonding Moments
item.description: The article details the heartwarming story of a golden retriever named Grandma who has welcomed a 5-week-old puppy into her home. Despite her age, Grandma remains playful and affectionate, allowing th...

item.title: Former Indiana Fever Player Accuses Team of Harassment Cover-Up After Sophie Cunningham's Comments
item.description: A former Indiana Fever player, Brianna Turner, has accused the team of covering up harassment allegations against a male staff member, following comments by WNBA star Sophie Cunningham about protectin...

item.title: Cross-Border Accountant Analyzes Tax Implications of Trump Accounts
item.description: The article explores the complexities surrounding 'Trump accounts,' investment vehicles for children, from a Canadian tax perspective. Jordan Novack, a chartered professional accountant, highlights un...

item.title: Braun Series 9 Pro+ Review: Exceptional Comfort and Precision in Electric Shaving
item.description: The Braun Series 9 Pro+ is a flagship electric shaver that delivers an exceptionally close, remarkably comfortable shave, nearly rivaling the feel of a traditional wet razor. This review highlights it...

item.title: Kangaroo Island Aims to Eradicate Feral Cats
item.description: Kangaroo Island, a South Australian island, is making significant strides in its effort to eradicate feral cats from its eastern peninsula. This initiative represents a critical step in protecting the...

item.title: Corpower C4 Wave Power Generator Secures Certification for Commercial Use
item.description: The Norwegian certification agency DNV has certified Corpower Ocean's wave-driven power generator, the Corpower C4, for regular commercial use. This marks the first DNV prototype certificate for a wav...

item.title: Sam Docherty's Journey Through Cancer, Football, and Life After Sport
item.description: Sam Docherty's AFL career was marked by relentless challenges, including two cancer diagnoses, multiple injuries, and a grueling rehabilitation process. Despite these hardships, he carved out a 13-yea...

item.title: Oscar Sudi Criticizes Jackson Mandago Over Scholarship Scandal Acquittal
item.description: Kapseret MP Oscar Sudi has criticized former Uasin Gishu governor Jackson Mandago even after his acquittal in the KSh 1.1 billion Finland scholarship scandal. Sudi argued that parents who paid for the...

item.title: Supreme Court Transfers NAB Cases to Federal Constitutional Court
item.description: The Supreme Court of Pakistan has ruled that it cannot hear bail applications in pending National Accountability Bureau (NAB) appeals, transferring all such cases to the Federal Constitutional Court (...
